20260313000100_cycle1_foundation.notes: Legacy migration governed retroactively by the F8 registry baseline for 20260313000100_cycle1_foundation.

rollback.strategy: Restore previous application version, apply documented rollback SQL or restore physical backup if the schema is non-reversible.
steps: Pause deploy and traffic cutover.
Validate backup freshness and restore point.
Run rollback script or restore the previous stable snapshot.
Replay smoke tests and tenant isolation checks before reopening traffic.

batching.strategy: Chunk data backfills and lock-sensitive writes in bounded batches.

20260322000100_cycle8_data_resilience_co.notes: F8 hardening baseline: full tenant RLS coverage, immutable audit log and high-write tuning.

rollback.strategy: Restore previous application version, apply documented rollback SQL or restore physical backup if the schema is non-reversible.

20260331000100_cycle12_rls_policy_alignm.notes: Replaces legacy strict tenant RLS predicates with tenant_access_allowed() for bootstrap/admin-safe setup while preserving tenant isolation after session pinning.

rollback.strategy: Recreate the legacy get_current_tenant_id()-based policies for the affected tables or restore the previous stable snapshot if policy drift is detected after deploy.
steps: Pause deploy and traffic cutover.
Reapply the prior strict tenant RLS predicates for the affected tables.
Validate release smoke tests and tenant isolation checks in staging.
Restore the last stable snapshot if policy rollback does not converge cleanly.

20260402000100_cycle12_ci_schema_alignme.notes: Backfills the index/default/FK drift that forced CI to reconcile the schema with db push after migrate deploy.

rollback.strategy: Restore the previous application version and reintroduce the prior legacy indexes/defaults only if the new alignment migration causes schema validation regressions.
steps: Pause deploy and traffic cutover.
Validate the migration-state report and schema drift report.
Restore the previous stable snapshot or reapply the former index/default definitions if alignment introduces regressions.
Replay smoke tests and tenant isolation checks before reopening traffic.

20260407000100_cycle13_maternal_domain.notes: Adds the maternal-infant clinical domain baseline with tenant-aware patient, pregnancy, appointment, clinical note and neonatal tables plus RLS coverage.

rollback.strategy: Disable the clinical module in the application and restore the previous stable snapshot if the new domain tables or policies regress tenant isolation or CRUD flows.
steps: Pause deploy and clinical traffic cutover.
Validate backup freshness and current migration state.
Restore the previous stable snapshot or replay the documented rollback SQL for the new clinical tables and enums.
Replay release smoke tests and tenant isolation checks before reopening traffic.

20260407000100_workflow_revisions_rls_al.notes: Complements the workflow orchestration RLS rollout by enabling and forcing tenant policies on workflow_revisions so revision history follows the same isolation contract as workflows.

rollback.strategy: Drop the workflow_revisions tenant policy and restore the prior snapshot only if the added RLS enforcement breaks legitimate revision reads after deploy.
steps: Pause deploy and traffic cutover.
Validate the runtime RLS proof and workflow revision read paths.
Drop the new workflow_revisions policy or restore the last stable snapshot if reads regress.
Replay tenant isolation checks before reopening traffic.

20260407000300_phase1_lgpd_user_preferen.notes: Aligns user preference storage with the LGPD consent center so privacy UI, dashboard warnings and audit trails share the same persisted state.

rollback.strategy: Keep the consent center read-only and remove the added preference fields only if the new LGPD write path regresses notifications or privacy exports.
steps: Pause the rollout and validate the migration state.
Confirm backup freshness and the current preference payload shape.
Drop the LGPD preference columns and enums or restore the previous stable snapshot if needed.
Replay privacy, notification and dashboard smoke tests before reopening traffic.
